title: Medical Leverage
description: Pay to transport sick individuals to towns where treatment is known. Use medical assistance as leverage for favors. A softer form of influence than blackmail with less risk but potentially less effect.
definition-of-done: Medical assistance action available. Transport/treatment costs money. Successful assistance builds goodwill/leverage. Less risky than blackmail.
testing-plan: Verify medical assistance action. Test cost calculation. Verify goodwill/leverage generation. Verify lower risk than blackmail.
